Title: Mr. White Keys
Comment: The song roasts a superficial, elite businessman who fakes his way through life and lacks genuine "soul" or rhythm. The nickname "White Keys" underscores this fraudulence because, on a piano, staying on the C Major scale (only the white keys) allows a person to "fake" playing along without ever hitting a dissonant or "wrong" note.
